name: fl03-skills
description: FL03's personal skill marketplace for Claude Code — covering Rust, WebAssembly, quantitative finance, Polymarket trading, workflow orchestration, and more. Each skill is independently installable.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Research-grade quantitative finance. PhD-level toolkit covering stochastic calculus, derivative pricing, risk metrics, portfolio theory, numerical methods, and applied model library.

plugins.name: polymarket
plugins.description: Polymarket exchange reference. Protocol mechanics, CLOB/Gamma/Data APIs, L1 vs L2 authentication, relayer architecture, market types, resolution, and fees.

plugins.name: rust
plugins.description: Make any agent fluent in idiomatic Rust. Covers ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, async, traits, macros, the no_std/alloc/std tier system, cargo ecosystem, and WASM toolchain.

plugins.name: trader
plugins.description: Generalized autonomous trading agent protocol with 9-gate safety contract and Axiom MCP platform integration.

plugins.name: typing
plugins.description: Language-agnostic advanced type system knowledge. Dependent types, GADTs, type-level programming, and type-driven design across typed languages.

plugins.name: wasmtime
plugins.description: wasmtime host embedding reference for Rust. Instantiating WASM components, Store/Engine/Linker lifecycle, WASI integration, and hot-swap patterns.

plugins.name: webassembly
plugins.description: Language-agnostic WebAssembly guidance. WIT syntax, component model semantics, WASI capabilities, wasm-components, and the binary format.

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Development lifecycle and release management. Branching conventions, GitHub issue/PR/milestone management, CI/CD patterns, Rust workspace scaffolding, and sprint/phase structure.
